## Week in Review: 2026-07-13 to 2026-07-19

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 14.7.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

- **Liberal**: Avg interest 3.0 (+31.3% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.12)

- **One Nation**: Avg interest 14.7 (+25.6% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.17)
- **Animal Justice**: Avg interest 0.1 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Reason**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
